name: Practical Assessment Sign-off
html:
Workplace Practical Assessment Record

{{ doc.name }}

Apprentice: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Trainee", doc.student, "full_name") or doc.student }} Assessor: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Trainer", doc.instructor, "full_name") or doc.instructor }}
Competency / Task: {{ doc.competency }} Workplace / Site: {{ doc.workplace or "" }}
Assessment Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.assessment_date) }} Outcome: {{ doc.outcome }}
Status: {{ doc.workflow_state }}
{% if doc.task_description %}

Task Observed

{{ doc.task_description }}

{% endif %}

Assessor Comments

{{ doc.assessor_comments or "-" }}

Apprentice Comments / Reflection

{{ doc.apprentice_comments or "-" }}
{% if doc.evidence %}

Evidence Submitted

    {% for row in doc.evidence %}
  • [{{ row.evidence_type }}] {{ row.description or row.evidence_file }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
Assessor Signature{% if doc.assessor_signed %} — confirmed {{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(doc.assessor_signed_on) if doc.assessor_signed_on else "" }}{% endif %} Apprentice Signature{% if doc.apprentice_signed %} — acknowledged {{ frappe.utils.format_datetime(doc.apprentice_signed_on) if doc.apprentice_signed_on else "" }}{% endif %}
